summary: A rebroadcast Fox News segment (anchor and Dallas reporter Brooke Taylor, with FOX NEWS ALERT chyrons) covering the arrest of a Texas man for threatening ICE agents and Secretary Noem. It is a raw TV news clip, not produced entertainment or music-driven content.
notable_text: DHS: TX MAN ARRESTED FOR THREATENING I.C.E. & NOEM; TIKTOK USER URGES PEOPLE TO 'SHOOT AT I.C.E.'; FOX NEWS ALERT
